case_title: DAN DUBINSKY VS. GEORGE KULYA et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-01-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST DAN DUBINSKY, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-01-2004, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-17-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: PATTY LEE HUBBLE, CSR#3058. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-01-2004 CONTINUED TO MAY-03-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST DAN DUBINSKY, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-02-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-17-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-01-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-16-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED , AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-03-2004 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: CHRISTINA PAXTON. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

parties.name: DUBINSKY, DAN 3624 IRVING STREET. # A SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-03-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Christina Paxton. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2004 Continued To May-03-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/3/2004 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Brenda Fields. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2004 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-01-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
